violations.text: Establishment lacking a staff person certified in servsafe at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Observed the non-food contact surfaces of the fans in walk-in cooler have an black residue. Equipment shall be maintained cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Observed condensation buildup in walk-in freezer and ice on freezer floor during time of inspection. The ice buildup shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent further ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Observed the outside dumpster side door open during time of inspection. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept closed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Observed mop in bucket of greyish water at time of inspection. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The front hand sink was observed being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Fan covers of low boy refrigeration units had an accumulation of dust 2) Fan covers of walk-in cooler had an accumulation of dust 3) Inner 'flip top' area of sandwich unit had food debris New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and spilled liquids. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
